Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x467C "DARKSIDE-07C5-467C" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07c5 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dark Side.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Copied colour RAM to $D800 in actual ram and then added an init routine at $07C5 to restore back to colour RAM from there. This allows the game to start after the decrunching step of the original and thus more quickly.
